---
title: "05_operon_enrichment"
output: html_document
---

## Operons investigation

### Data preparation

```{r, message=FALSE}
# Read annotation files
gff <- import("data/BSGatlas_v1.1.gff")
```


```{r}
# Extract operons
operons <- gff[mcols(gff)$type == "operon"]

operon_df <- as.data.frame(mcols(operons)) %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, Name)

genes <- gff[mcols(gff)$type == "gene"]

gene_operon_map <- as.data.frame(mcols(genes)) %>%
  mutate(
    locus_tag = sapply(locus_tag, function(x) {
      if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
      paste(x, collapse = ";")
    }),
    gene_name = sapply(Name, function(x) {
      if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
      paste(x, collapse = ";")
    }),
    Parent = sapply(Parent, function(x) {
      if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
      x[1]
    })
  ) %>%
  tidyr::separate_rows(locus_tag, sep = ";") %>%
  filter(!is.na(locus_tag)) %>%
  select(ID, locus_tag, gene_name, Parent)

gene_positions <- tibble(
  ID = mcols(genes)$ID,
  start = start(genes),
  strand = as.character(strand(genes))
)

gene_operon_map <- gene_operon_map %>%
  left_join(gene_positions, by = "ID")

gene_operon_map <- gene_operon_map %>%
  group_by(Parent) %>%
  arrange(
    if_else(strand == "+", start, -start),
    .by_group = TRUE
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

operon_names <- gene_operon_map %>%
  group_by(Parent) %>%
  summarise(
    operon_name = {
      g <- gene_name[!is.na(gene_name) & gene_name != ""]
      n <- min(3, length(g))
      if (length(g) == 0) {
        NA_character_
      } else {
        paste0(
          paste(g[1:n], collapse = "-"),
          ifelse(length(g) > 3, "-etc", ""),
          " operon"
        )
      }
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gene_operon_map <- gene_operon_map %>%
  left_join(operon_names, by = "Parent")


operon_mapping <- complete_gene_annotation %>%
  dplyr::select(ID_prodigal, locus_tag) %>%
  left_join(gene_operon_map, by = "locus_tag")

# > # How many genes got operons?
# > sum(!is.na(operon_mapping$Parent))
# [1] 6214
# > 
# > # How many failed?
# > sum(is.na(operon_mapping$Parent))
# [1] 849
```

### Goethite

```{r}

############ Goethite 3 h
# Add operon info to DE results
res_operon <- res_3h_G %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "ID_prodigal") %>%
  left_join(operon_mapping, by = "ID_prodigal")

table(!is.na(res_operon$Parent))  # How many DE genes are in operons

operon_summary <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05) %>%           # DE genes
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "up", "down")) %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, direction) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = direction, values_from = n_DE, values_fill = 0)

# Only DE genes
# Filter DE genes that have operon assigned
de_operons <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, !is.na(Parent)) %>%
  group_by(Parent) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_DE))

top_operons <- head(de_operons$Parent, 10)

top_operon_genes <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, Parent %in% top_operons) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "up", "down"))

# Aggregate up/down counts
top_operon_summary <- top_operon_genes %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, direction) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(n_DE = ifelse(direction == "down", -n_DE, n_DE))  # negative for down

ggplot(top_operon_summary, aes(x = reorder(operon_name, n_DE), y = n_DE, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("up" = "red", "down" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Operon", y = "Number of DE genes", title = "Top 10 operons with most DE genes - Goethite 3h") +
  theme_minimal()

############# Goethite 24 h
# Add operon info to DE results
res_operon <- res_24h_G %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "ID_prodigal") %>%
  left_join(operon_mapping, by = "ID_prodigal")

table(!is.na(res_operon$Parent))  # How many DE genes are in operons

operon_summary <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05) %>%           # DE genes
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "up", "down")) %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, direction) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = direction, values_from = n_DE, values_fill = 0)

# Only DE genes
# Filter DE genes that have operon assigned
de_operons <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, !is.na(Parent)) %>%
  group_by(Parent) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_DE))

top_operons <- head(de_operons$Parent, 10)

top_operon_genes <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, Parent %in% top_operons) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "up", "down"))

# Aggregate up/down counts
top_operon_summary <- top_operon_genes %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, direction) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(n_DE = ifelse(direction == "down", -n_DE, n_DE))  # negative for down

ggplot(top_operon_summary, aes(x = reorder(operon_name, n_DE), y = n_DE, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("up" = "red", "down" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Operon", y = "Number of DE genes", title = "Top 10 operons with most DE genes - Goethite 24h") +
  theme_minimal()
```

### Hematite

```{r}
############ Hematite 3 h
# Add operon info to DE results
res_operon <- res_3h_H %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "ID_prodigal") %>%
  left_join(operon_mapping, by = "ID_prodigal")

table(!is.na(res_operon$Parent))  # How many DE genes are in operons

operon_summary <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05) %>%           # DE genes
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "up", "down")) %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, direction) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = direction, values_from = n_DE, values_fill = 0)

# Only DE genes
# Filter DE genes that have operon assigned
de_operons <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, !is.na(Parent)) %>%
  group_by(Parent) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_DE))

top_operons <- head(de_operons$Parent, 10)

top_operon_genes <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, Parent %in% top_operons) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "up", "down"))

# Aggregate up/down counts
top_operon_summary <- top_operon_genes %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, direction) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(n_DE = ifelse(direction == "down", -n_DE, n_DE))  # negative for down

ggplot(top_operon_summary, aes(x = reorder(operon_name, n_DE), y = n_DE, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("up" = "red", "down" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Operon", y = "Number of DE genes", title = "Top 10 operons with most DE genes - Hemaite 3h") +
  theme_minimal()

############# Hematite 24 h
# Add operon info to DE results
res_operon <- res_24h_H %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "ID_prodigal") %>%
  left_join(operon_mapping, by = "ID_prodigal")

table(!is.na(res_operon$Parent))  # How many DE genes are in operons

operon_summary <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05) %>%           # DE genes
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "up", "down")) %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, direction) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = direction, values_from = n_DE, values_fill = 0)

# Only DE genes
# Filter DE genes that have operon assigned
de_operons <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, !is.na(Parent)) %>%
  group_by(Parent) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_DE))

top_operons <- head(de_operons$Parent, 10)

top_operon_genes <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, Parent %in% top_operons) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "up", "down"))

# Aggregate up/down counts
top_operon_summary <- top_operon_genes %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, direction) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(n_DE = ifelse(direction == "down", -n_DE, n_DE))  # negative for down

ggplot(top_operon_summary, aes(x = reorder(operon_name, n_DE), y = n_DE, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("up" = "red", "down" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Operon", y = "Number of DE genes", title = "Top 10 operons with most DE genes - Hematite 24h") +
  theme_minimal()
```

### Mica

```{r}
############ Mica 3 h
# Add operon info to DE results
res_operon <- res_3h_M %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "ID_prodigal") %>%
  left_join(operon_mapping, by = "ID_prodigal")

table(!is.na(res_operon$Parent))  # How many DE genes are in operons

operon_summary <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05) %>%           # DE genes
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "up", "down")) %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, direction) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = direction, values_from = n_DE, values_fill = 0)

# Only DE genes
# Filter DE genes that have operon assigned
de_operons <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, !is.na(Parent)) %>%
  group_by(Parent) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_DE))

top_operons <- head(de_operons$Parent, 10)

top_operon_genes <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, Parent %in% top_operons) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "up", "down"))

# Aggregate up/down counts
top_operon_summary <- top_operon_genes %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, direction) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(n_DE = ifelse(direction == "down", -n_DE, n_DE))  # negative for down

ggplot(top_operon_summary, aes(x = reorder(operon_name, n_DE), y = n_DE, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("up" = "red", "down" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Operon", y = "Number of DE genes", title = "Top 10 operons with most DE genes - Mica 3h") +
  theme_minimal()

############# Mica 24 h
# Add operon info to DE results
res_operon <- res_24h_M %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "ID_prodigal") %>%
  left_join(operon_mapping, by = "ID_prodigal")

table(!is.na(res_operon$Parent))  # How many DE genes are in operons

operon_summary <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05) %>%           # DE genes
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "up", "down")) %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, direction) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = direction, values_from = n_DE, values_fill = 0)

# Only DE genes
# Filter DE genes that have operon assigned
de_operons <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, !is.na(Parent)) %>%
  group_by(Parent) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_DE))

top_operons <- head(de_operons$Parent, 10)

top_operon_genes <- res_operon %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05, Parent %in% top_operons) %>%
  mutate(direction = ifelse(logFC > 0, "up", "down"))

# Aggregate up/down counts
top_operon_summary <- top_operon_genes %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, direction) %>%
  summarise(n_DE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(n_DE = ifelse(direction == "down", -n_DE, n_DE))  # negative for down

ggplot(top_operon_summary, aes(x = reorder(operon_name, n_DE), y = n_DE, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("up" = "red", "down" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Operon", y = "Number of DE genes", title = "Top 10 operons with most DE genes - Mica 24h") +
  theme_minimal()
```


### Overlaps 3h


```{r}
get_DE_genes <- function(res) {
  res %>%
    rownames_to_column("ID_prodigal") %>%
    filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05) %>%
    pull(ID_prodigal)
}

de_G <- get_DE_genes(res_3h_G)
de_H <- get_DE_genes(res_3h_H)
de_M <- get_DE_genes(res_3h_M)


intersect_GH <- intersect(de_G, de_H)
intersect_GM <- intersect(de_G, de_M)
intersect_HM <- intersect(de_H, de_M)

intersect_all <- Reduce(intersect, list(de_G, de_H, de_M))
```

```{r}
library(UpSetR)

listInput <- list(G = de_G, H = de_H, M = de_M)
upset(fromList(listInput))
```

```{r}
get_directional_genes <- function(res, padj_cutoff = 0.05, lfc_cutoff = 0) {
  res_tbl <- res %>%
    rownames_to_column("ID_prodigal")
  
  up_genes <- res_tbl %>%
    filter(adj.P.Val < padj_cutoff, logFC > lfc_cutoff) %>%
    pull(ID_prodigal)
  
  down_genes <- res_tbl %>%
    filter(adj.P.Val < padj_cutoff, logFC < -lfc_cutoff) %>%
    pull(ID_prodigal)
  
  list(
    up = unique(up_genes),
    down = unique(down_genes)
  )
}

dir_G <- get_directional_genes(res_3h_G)
dir_H <- get_directional_genes(res_3h_H)
dir_M <- get_directional_genes(res_3h_M)

up_list <- list(
  G = dir_G$up,
  H = dir_H$up,
  M = dir_M$up
)

down_list <- list(
  G = dir_G$down,
  H = dir_H$down,
  M = dir_M$down
)


up_input <- fromList(up_list)
down_input <- fromList(down_list)

upset(
  up_input,
  sets = c("G", "H", "M"),
  order.by = "freq",
  main.bar.color = "firebrick",
  sets.bar.color = c("#E1AD01","#800020", "#B8B8B8"),
  mainbar.y.label = "Shared upregulated genes",
  sets.x.label = "Upregulated genes per condition"
)

upset(
  down_input,
  sets = c("G", "H", "M"),
  order.by = "freq",
  main.bar.color = "navy",
  sets.bar.color = c("#E1AD01","#800020", "#B8B8B8"),
  mainbar.y.label = "Shared downregulated genes",
  sets.x.label = "Downregulated genes per condition"
)


```

```{r}

annotate_with_operons <- function(res, complete_gene_annotation, gene_operon_map, condition_name) {
  res %>%
    rownames_to_column("ID_prodigal") %>%
    left_join(
      complete_gene_annotation %>% select(ID_prodigal, locus_tag),
      by = "ID_prodigal"
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      gene_operon_map %>% select(locus_tag, gene_name, Parent, operon_name),
      by = "locus_tag"
    ) %>%
    mutate(condition = condition_name)
}

res_G_operon <- annotate_with_operons(res_3h_G, complete_gene_annotation, gene_operon_map, "G")
res_H_operon <- annotate_with_operons(res_3h_H, complete_gene_annotation, gene_operon_map, "H")
res_M_operon <- annotate_with_operons(res_3h_M, complete_gene_annotation, gene_operon_map, "M")

all_operon_res <- bind_rows(res_G_operon, res_H_operon, res_M_operon) %>%
  mutate(
    direction = case_when(
      adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC > 0 ~ "up",
      adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC < 0 ~ "down",
      TRUE ~ "not_DE"
    )
  )

operon_condition_summary <- all_operon_res %>%
  filter(!is.na(Parent)) %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, condition) %>%
  summarise(
    n_genes = n(),
    n_up = sum(direction == "up"),
    n_down = sum(direction == "down"),
    mean_logFC = mean(logFC, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    operon_state = case_when(
      n_up >= 2 & n_down == 0   ~ "up",
      n_down >= 2 & n_up == 0   ~ "down",
      TRUE ~ "mixed_or_notDE"
    )
  )

operon_wide <- operon_condition_summary %>%
  select(Parent, operon_name, condition, operon_state, n_up, n_down, mean_logFC) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = condition,
    values_from = c(operon_state, n_up, n_down, mean_logFC)
  )

operons_up_all <- operon_wide %>%
  filter(
    operon_state_G == "up",
    operon_state_H == "up",
    operon_state_M == "up"
  )

operons_down_all <- operon_wide %>%
  filter(
    operon_state_G == "down",
    operon_state_H == "down",
    operon_state_M == "down"
  )
```

```{r}

heatmap_df <- operon_condition_summary %>%
  filter(Parent %in% operons_up_all$Parent | Parent %in% operons_down_all$Parent)

ggplot(heatmap_df, aes(x = condition, y = operon_name, fill = mean_logFC)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Condition", y = "Operon", fill = "Mean logFC")
```
```{r}
operon_condition_summary <- all_operon_res %>%
  filter(!is.na(Parent)) %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, condition) %>%
  summarise(
    n_genes = n(),
    n_up = sum(direction == "up"),
    n_down = sum(direction == "down"),
    n_DE = sum(direction %in% c("up", "down")),
    mean_logFC = mean(logFC, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

top_variable_operons <- operon_condition_summary %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name) %>%
  summarise(
    logFC_range = max(mean_logFC, na.rm = TRUE) - min(mean_logFC, na.rm = TRUE),
    has_pos = any(mean_logFC > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    has_neg = any(mean_logFC < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_conditions_DE = sum(n_DE > 0),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_conditions_DE >= 2, has_pos, has_neg) %>%
  arrange(desc(logFC_range)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

heatmap_df_top <- operon_condition_summary %>%
  semi_join(top_variable_operons, by = c("Parent", "operon_name"))

operon_order <- heatmap_df_top %>%
  select(Parent, operon_name, condition, mean_logFC) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = condition, values_from = mean_logFC) %>%
  arrange(G, H, M) %>%
  pull(operon_name)

heatmap_df_top <- heatmap_df_top %>%
  mutate(operon_name = factor(operon_name, levels = operon_order))

ggplot(heatmap_df_top, aes(x = condition, y = operon_name, fill = mean_logFC)) +
  geom_tile(color = "grey85") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Condition",
    y = "Operon",
    fill = "Mean logFC",
    title = "Top variable operons across conditions"
  )
```
### Overlap 24 h

```{r}
# de_G <- get_DE_genes(res_24h_G)
# de_H <- get_DE_genes(res_24h_H)
# de_M <- get_DE_genes(res_24h_M)
# 
# 
# intersect_GH <- intersect(de_G, de_H)
# intersect_GM <- intersect(de_G, de_M)
# intersect_HM <- intersect(de_H, de_M)
# 
# intersect_all <- Reduce(intersect, list(de_G, de_H, de_M))


dir_G <- get_directional_genes(res_24h_G)
dir_H <- get_directional_genes(res_24h_H)
dir_M <- get_directional_genes(res_24h_M)

up_list <- list(
  G = dir_G$up,
  H = dir_H$up,
  M = dir_M$up
)

down_list <- list(
  G = dir_G$down,
  H = dir_H$down,
  M = dir_M$down
)


up_input <- fromList(up_list)
down_input <- fromList(down_list)

upset(
  up_input,
  sets = c("G", "H", "M"),
  order.by = "freq",
  main.bar.color = "firebrick",
  sets.bar.color = c("#E1AD01","#800020", "#B8B8B8"),
  mainbar.y.label = "Shared upregulated genes",
  sets.x.label = "Upregulated genes per condition"
)

upset(
  down_input,
  sets = c("G", "H", "M"),
  order.by = "freq",
  main.bar.color = "navy",
  sets.bar.color = c("#E1AD01","#800020", "#B8B8B8"),
  mainbar.y.label = "Shared downregulated genes",
  sets.x.label = "Downregulated genes per condition"
)



res_G_operon <- annotate_with_operons(res_24h_G, complete_gene_annotation, gene_operon_map, "G")
res_H_operon <- annotate_with_operons(res_24h_H, complete_gene_annotation, gene_operon_map, "H")
res_M_operon <- annotate_with_operons(res_24h_M, complete_gene_annotation, gene_operon_map, "M")

all_operon_res <- bind_rows(res_G_operon, res_H_operon, res_M_operon) %>%
  mutate(
    direction = case_when(
      adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC > 0 ~ "up",
      adj.P.Val < 0.05 & logFC < 0 ~ "down",
      TRUE ~ "not_DE"
    )
  )

operon_condition_summary <- all_operon_res %>%
  filter(!is.na(Parent)) %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, condition) %>%
  summarise(
    n_genes = n(),
    n_up = sum(direction == "up"),
    n_down = sum(direction == "down"),
    mean_logFC = mean(logFC, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    operon_state = case_when(
      n_up >= 2 & n_down == 0   ~ "up",
      n_down >= 2 & n_up == 0   ~ "down",
      TRUE ~ "mixed_or_notDE"
    )
  )

operon_wide <- operon_condition_summary %>%
  select(Parent, operon_name, condition, operon_state, n_up, n_down, mean_logFC) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = condition,
    values_from = c(operon_state, n_up, n_down, mean_logFC)
  )

operons_up_all <- operon_wide %>%
  filter(
    operon_state_G == "up",
    operon_state_H == "up",
    operon_state_M == "up"
  )

operons_down_all <- operon_wide %>%
  filter(
    operon_state_G == "down",
    operon_state_H == "down",
    operon_state_M == "down"
  )


heatmap_df <- operon_condition_summary %>%
  filter(Parent %in% operons_up_all$Parent | Parent %in% operons_down_all$Parent)

ggplot(heatmap_df, aes(x = condition, y = operon_name, fill = mean_logFC)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Condition", y = "Operon", fill = "Mean logFC")



operon_condition_summary <- all_operon_res %>%
  filter(!is.na(Parent)) %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name, condition) %>%
  summarise(
    n_genes = n(),
    n_up = sum(direction == "up"),
    n_down = sum(direction == "down"),
    n_DE = sum(direction %in% c("up", "down")),
    mean_logFC = mean(logFC, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

top_variable_operons <- operon_condition_summary %>%
  group_by(Parent, operon_name) %>%
  summarise(
    logFC_range = max(mean_logFC, na.rm = TRUE) - min(mean_logFC, na.rm = TRUE),
    has_pos = any(mean_logFC > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    has_neg = any(mean_logFC < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_conditions_DE = sum(n_DE > 0),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_conditions_DE >= 2, has_pos, has_neg) %>%
  arrange(desc(logFC_range)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

heatmap_df_top <- operon_condition_summary %>%
  semi_join(top_variable_operons, by = c("Parent", "operon_name"))

operon_order <- heatmap_df_top %>%
  select(Parent, operon_name, condition, mean_logFC) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = condition, values_from = mean_logFC) %>%
  arrange(G, H, M) %>%
  pull(operon_name)

heatmap_df_top <- heatmap_df_top %>%
  mutate(operon_name = factor(operon_name, levels = operon_order))

ggplot(heatmap_df_top, aes(x = condition, y = operon_name, fill = mean_logFC)) +
  geom_tile(color = "grey85") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Condition",
    y = "Operon",
    fill = "Mean logFC",
    title = "Top variable operons across conditions"
  )
```


```{r}
logFC_df <- res_3h_G %>%
  rownames_to_column("ID_prodigal") %>%
  select(ID_prodigal, logFC_G = logFC) %>%
  left_join(
    res_3h_H %>%
      rownames_to_column("ID_prodigal") %>%
      select(ID_prodigal, logFC_H = logFC),
    by = "ID_prodigal"
  )


ggplot(logFC_df, aes(x = logFC_G, y = logFC_H)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  theme_minimal()
```
